# terrible_ngine_io_cloudstack_vlan_ip_range (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `start_ip` (String) The beginning IPv4 address in the VLAN IP range. Only considered on create.
- `zone` (String) The Zone ID of the VLAN IP range.

### Optional

- `account` (String) Account who owns the VLAN. Mutually exclusive with *project*.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `cidr_ipv6` (String) The CIDR of IPv6 network, must be at least /64.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `domain` (String) Domain of the account owning the VLAN.
- `end_ip` (String) The ending IPv4 address in the VLAN IP range. If not specified, value of *start_ip* is used. Only considered on create.
- `end_ipv6` (String) The ending IPv6 address in the IPv6 network range. If not specified, value of *start_ipv6* is used. Only considered on create.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `for_system_vms` (Boolean) `yes` if IP range is set to system vms, `no` if not
- `for_virtual_network` (Boolean) `yes` if VLAN is of Virtual type, `no` if Direct. If set to `yes` but neither *physical_network* or *network* is set CloudStack will try to add the VLAN range to the Physical Network with a Public traffic type.
- `gateway` (String) The gateway of the VLAN IP range. Required if *state=present*.
- `gateway_ipv6` (String) The gateway of the IPv6 network. Only considered on create.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `netmask` (String) The netmask of the VLAN IP range. Required if *state=present*.
- `network` (String) The network name or id. Required if *for_virtual_network* and *physical_network* are not set.
- `physical_network` (String) The physical network name or id.
- `pod` (String) Name of the pod.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `project` (String) Project who owns the VLAN. Mutually exclusive with *account*.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `start_ipv6` (String) The beginning IPv6 address in the IPv6 network range. Only considered on create.
- `state` (String) State of the network ip range.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vlan` (String) The ID or VID of the network. If not specified, will be defaulted to the vlan of the network.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `for_systemvms` (Boolean) Whether VLAN IP range is dedicated to system vms or not.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
